content:
- **Major** — `ai_router` 0.3.1 is documented as shipping the new e2e harness, but `pyproject.toml` explicitly excludes `ai_router.tests*` from the wheel. For PyPI consumers, the 0.3.1 release notes are materially false, and the patch-bump rationale is not backed by packaged contents. → **Location:** `ai_router/CHANGELOG.md:11-22`, `tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/CHANGELOG.md:39-42`, `pyproject.toml:50-60` → **Fix:** Either include the harness files in the published package, or rewrite the changelogs/version-bump rationale to say this is repo-only test infrastructure and stop claiming it shipped in `dabbler-ai-router` 0.3.1.

- **Minor** — The cancelled Playwright scenario claims reason-badge coverage but never asserts any cancellation-reason text/badge. A regression that removes the reason badge would still pass. → **Location:** `tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/test/playwright/treeView.spec.ts:179-205` → **Fix:** Pass an explicit cancel reason through the harness and assert that exact reason/badge text appears in the cancelled row, or rename the test to remove “with reason badge” if that is not actually part of the acceptance criteria.

- **Minor** — `teardown()` is not best-effort. If `closeVSCode()` throws, `cleanupTmpDir()` is skipped, leaving leaked temp dirs/processes and increasing serial-suite flake risk. → **Location:** `tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/test/playwright/treeView.spec.ts:44-46` → **Fix:** Make cleanup independent, e.g. nested `try/finally` or `Promise.allSettled`, so temp-dir cleanup still runs even when VS Code shutdown fails; report aggregated cleanup failures afterward.

- **Minor** — Session 4 documentation says Playwright is configured for a 90s test timeout, but every scenario locally overrides to 120s. The close-out record is not accurate as written. → **Location:** `docs/session-sets/027-orchestrator-e2e-harness/change-log.md:111-112`, `tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/test/playwright/treeView.spec.ts:81`, `:115`, `:153`, `:180`, `:215` → **Fix:** Remove the per-test `120_000` overrides and rely on the documented 90s config, or update the docs to say the effective per-test timeout is 120s.

- **Minor** — The Session 4 cost row is left as bare `TBD`, with no explicit note that it must be backfilled after Round B. That leaves the close-out/audit trail incomplete. → **Location:** `docs/session-sets/027-orchestrator-e2e-harness/change-log.md:159-166` → **Fix:** Replace `TBD` with the final verification cost before merge, or add an explicit “to be amended post-verification” note so the follow-up is part of the recorded close-out.
